arbeitsweise.approach_title.text_01: Good collaboration starts with a clear shared understanding.
arbeitsweise.p.text_01: Clear requirements, visible dependencies and documented decisions give everyone a reliable basis for action.
arbeitsweise.p.text_02: Bring goals, user needs, constraints and technical reality together.
arbeitsweise.p.text_03: Turn complex briefs into prioritised, actionable and testable work packages.
arbeitsweise.p.text_04: Keep business, design and engineering aligned through transparent communication.
arbeitsweise.p.text_05: Support quality, accessibility, performance and consistent implementation through to release.
head.meta.content_01: Daniela Klein combines more than ten years of frontend and e-commerce experience with structured project delivery and AI project management.
head.meta.content_03: Technical understanding, a strong design perspective and clear project structures for digital products and e-commerce.
kontakt.contact_title.text_01: Does your digital initiative need technical clarity and reliable coordination?
kontakt.p.text_01: Let’s talk about projects, product operations, delivery or technical project management.
laufbahn.h3.text_02: Senior Frontend Development · Project & Delivery Focus
laufbahn.p.text_01: A start in design, growth through frontend development and a clear focus today on coordination, requirements and delivery.
laufbahn.p.text_02: Planning AI projects, evaluating use cases, agile collaboration, quality metrics, data protection and technical foundations.
laufbahn.p.text_03: Delivery of digital products and relaunches, coordination with design and engineering, quality assurance, releases and onboarding support.
laufbahn.p.text_04: Websites, relaunches and promotions for multiple brands, technical coordination across teams and support for reviews and releases.
laufbahn.p.text_05: Foundation in digital design, visual communication and media-appropriate execution.
profil.p.text_01: That experience is the basis for the move into project management. It supports realistic assessments of technical opportunities and constraints, keeps design requirements understandable and helps prepare work effectively for delivery. Training in AI Project Management adds the planning and evaluation of AI initiatives.
profil.p.text_02: Work with structure, communicate clearly and keep commitments.
profil.profile_title.text_01: Ten years in development – followed by a deliberate move into project management.
profil.story_intro.text_01: Frontend development made one thing clear early on: good digital products depend on clear requirements, timely alignment and decisions that teams can follow.
projekte.p.text_01: Selected project contributions across e-commerce, platform, brand and agency environments.
projekte.p.text_02: Frontend delivery in a complex multi-market environment, focused on technical requirements, quality and reliable execution.
projekte.p.text_03: Liquid implementation, design-to-code and technical quality assurance for the e-commerce storefront.
projekte.p.text_04: Delivery of websites, relaunches and promotions, plus maintenance of a modular white-label platform for more than ten brands.
projekte.p.text_05: Frontend delivery across several project phases, including technical requirements alignment and quality assurance.
projekte.p.text_06: White-label solutions and migrations for digital magazine products in an editorial platform environment.
projekte.p.text_07: Deco Walther, Weinbauer, elbcampus, The Singleton, Bouygues and the Patrick & Friends agency relaunch.
staerken.p.text_01: Capabilities measured by their contribution to reliable collaboration – not by buzzwords.
staerken.p.text_02: Turn complex initiatives into clear next steps, make dependencies visible and protect quality from briefing to release.
staerken.p.text_03: Connect user needs, business goals and technical feasibility in work that can be prioritised.
staerken.p.text_04: Moderate different perspectives and create shared understanding through clear documentation.
staerken.p.text_05: Experience with scalable storefronts, platforms and brand-consistent delivery in demanding environments.
staerken.p.text_06: Assess effort, risks and solution paths based on hands-on development experience – complemented by AI product lifecycle, MLOps, Responsible AI and data-based success criteria.
technologien.p.text_01: A broad technical foundation, organised by relevance to projects and products.
top.eyebrow.text_01: Hamburg · open to the next project opportunity
top.hero_lead.text_01: More than ten years of frontend and e-commerce experience provide the foundation for structured project delivery. Technical requirements are made accessible, decisions are documented clearly and digital initiatives are supported reliably through to release.
